purpose: Introduce the alien biology and the presence of the "Incubator."
summary: The protagonist explores a nearby glass-roofed enclosure. Inside, he observes hundreds of large white eggs, some of which have hatched into grotesque, six-limbed creatures with antennae and independent eyes.
production_intent: Establish the biological threat and alien lifecycle through close-up observation of the incubator contents. The visual progression must move from curiosity regarding the eggs to visceral horror at the hatched creatures.

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the biological threat and alien lifecycle through close-up observation of the incubator contents. The visual progression must move from curiosity regarding the eggs to visceral horror at the hatched creatures.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, physically fit)

## Required Environments
- martian_incubator_enclosure (low, walled glass enclosure within a circular basin with yellowish moss and quartz rocks)

## Continuity Constraints
- Egg state (hatched vs unhatched) must remain consistent per shot
- Movement patterns of six-limbed creatures must be synchronized with hatching status

## Beat List
- BT001: Approach to the incubator
- BT002: Observation of eggs
- BT003: Discovery of creatures
